creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
Created attachment 160157
higan.patch

The included patch is to make portlint happier (the only thing it still complains about is LICENSE) and also to the newer Options helpers with the post-patch-*-on and pre-build-*-on targets.

NOTE: Because of portlint recommending using make makepatch, I removed files/patch-shaders and included 2 separate patches for the two files changed by the removed patch.
